en.commentary:
2026 is the year SACC stopped being a footnote and became the only number that matters when you shop for a portable air conditioner. ASHRAE BTU was always inflated, and any unit that quotes 14,000 ASHRAE without the SACC figure is hiding the actual cooling you get on a 95-degree day. I ranked these the way I would shop them in May, by SACC first, dual-hose efficiency second, noise third, and only then by sticker price.

Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL takes first because it is the only portable AC in the $700 range that delivers 12,000 SACC, integrated heat for shoulder seasons, and a noise floor of 42 dBA on low. The hose-in-hose design is a real engineering win, it gives you dual-hose efficiency without dragging two giant tubes across your floor. SmartHome works with Alexa, Google, and Apple Watch, and the inverter compressor saves real money on a hot August electric bill. If you have $700 to spend on cooling 550 sq ft, this is the answer.

Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN takes second and is the right pick for anyone with a room over 550 sq ft. The 12,000 SACC matches the Midea Duo, the dual-hose configuration is more thermodynamically efficient than the Midea hose-in-hose at maximum load, and the 87-pint dehumidifier is class-leading. RTINGS measured it dropping room temperature from 84 to 72 degrees in 60 minutes, which is the best raw cooling result of any unit I researched. The patented auto-drain means you almost never empty a bucket. Whynter NEX edits down to second only because the Midea is roughly $30 cheaper and adds heat.

LG LP1419IVSM at three is the energy-efficiency champion. The Dual Inverter compressor hits a SACC-per-watt ratio of 7.3, which is the highest in the category, and the 44 dB low setting is quieter than the Midea by a hair. ThinQ is the most polished portable AC app I have used. The reason it is at three rather than first is the SACC, 10,000 SACC for 500 sq ft is genuinely good but does not match the 12,000 SACC of the Whynter or Midea. Buy the LG if your priority is the lowest electric bill over a five-year ownership period.

Whynter Elite ARC-122DS at four is the smartest mid-range purchase in 2026. Dual-hose configuration at $469 is unheard of in this price tier, and the activated carbon filter handles smoke and allergens better than any single-hose unit on this list. The 7,000 SACC limits it to 400 sq ft, but for a bedroom or home office it is the most cooling you can buy without crossing $500.

DeLonghi Pinguino Arctic Whisper PAC EX390LVYN at five is the right purchase for anyone whose primary complaint about portable ACs is the noise. The cabinet acoustics are noticeably better than the budget tier, EcoReal Feel adjusts based on ambient humidity not just temperature, and Cool Surround Technology genuinely changes how the air feels in the room. It loses to the LG only on raw efficiency and to the Midea on smart features.

Black+Decker BPACT14WT at six is still the right answer if your budget caps at $400 and you need to cool a 700 sq ft living room. Five-minute window install, the Follow Me remote that uses the remote sensor to maintain temperature where you sit, and reliability across thousands of long-term reviews. The honest trade-off is the 7,700 SACC running at high power consumption, you will pay roughly $220 in summer electric over 90 days of heavy use. Worth it for the entry price, expensive long term.

KoolSiln 14,000 BTU at seven is the dark-horse pick for buyers who care about quiet above all and do not want to pay DeLonghi prices. 44 dB sleep mode genuinely rivals the LG and DeLonghi, and the 360-degree auto-evaporation means almost no manual draining. The ranking suffers because the SACC is not published transparently, the brand is newer with a thinner long-term support track record, and efficiency lags inverter models. The right purchase if quiet is your only requirement and you found the Amazon price of $440.

Frigidaire FHPC102AC1 at eight is the bedroom-only specialist. 10,000 ASHRAE BTU is enough for a 250 sq ft room and not a square foot more, the R-32 refrigerant is environmentally responsible, and the price has dropped to $329 in May 2026. Buy it for a guest room or small bedroom. Do not try to cool a living room with it.

highlights.title: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL is the portable AC I would buy in 2026 without a second thought
highlights.body: 12,000 SACC for 550 sq ft, hose-in-hose dual-hose efficiency without two ugly tubes on your floor, 42 dBA quiet mode that lets you sleep, integrated heat for shoulder seasons, and a SmartHome app that genuinely works with Alexa, Google, and Apple Watch. At $679 it costs less than the LG and gives you more cooling capacity. The inverter compressor saves real money on a 95-degree August week. If someone asks me for one portable AC recommendation in 2026, this is the answer.

highlights.title: SACC is the only number you should shop on, ASHRAE BTU is marketing inflation
highlights.body: Every portable AC sold in the US since 2017 publishes both ASHRAE BTU and SACC. ASHRAE assumes a 95-degree outdoor day with the unit working perfectly. SACC is the seasonally adjusted number that reflects what you actually get across a real summer. A 14,000 ASHRAE / 7,700 SACC unit cools roughly 55 percent of what the box says. A 14,000 ASHRAE / 12,000 SACC unit like the Midea Duo or Whynter NEX cools 86 percent. Once you internalize this, every portable AC purchase decision becomes obvious.

highlights.title: Dual-hose still wins thermodynamically, single-hose still wins on convenience
highlights.body: Single-hose units exhaust hot air outside while pulling replacement air from inside the room, which means they create negative pressure that sucks hot outside air back through every gap in your window seal. Dual-hose units pull combustion air from outside, so the room stays at neutral pressure and cools faster. The Midea Duo hose-in-hose design is the best of both worlds, you get dual-hose physics in a single visible tube. The Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN is traditional dual-hose and slightly more efficient at peak load. Single-hose still makes sense if your priority is the lowest setup hassle, but understand the trade-off.

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM is the right pick if your five-year electric bill matters more than upfront price
highlights.body: Dual Inverter technology in the LP1419IVSM hits a SACC-per-watt ratio of 7.3, the highest in any portable AC I tested. Over five years of summer use that adds up to roughly $400 less in electric costs compared to a non-inverter unit at the same SACC. The 44 dB low setting is the quietest mainstream portable AC I know of, and ThinQ is the only portable AC app I would actually open. The reason it is at three not one is the 10,000 SACC for 500 sq ft, the Midea and Whynter both push 12,000 SACC and beat it on raw cooling. Buy the LG if you live somewhere expensive electricity and you keep AC for the long haul.

highlights.title: Skip the cordless and gimmicky portable ACs, the boring units win every test
highlights.body: Every summer Amazon fills up with personal coolers, evaporative cubes, and battery-powered novelty units that promise to cool a room. None of them work the way a refrigerant compressor unit works. If you need to drop a room from 88 degrees to 72 degrees on a humid Texas afternoon, you need an actual portable air conditioner with at least 7,000 SACC, a real exhaust hose, and a refrigerant cycle. The Whynter Elite at $469 is the cheapest unit on this list that genuinely solves the problem. Anything cheaper is either a dehumidifier or an air-moving device pretending to be an AC.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年是 SACC 終於從規格表小字變成可攜式冷氣唯一該看的數字的一年。ASHRAE BTU 一直都是膨風值，任何一台只標 14,000 ASHRAE 卻不寫 SACC 的機型，都是在隱藏實際在 35 度高溫天能給你多少冷度。這份排行我是用五月買冷氣的角度來排的，先看 SACC、再看雙軟管效率、第三看噪音，最後才看標價。

Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL 排第一，因為它是兩萬塊台幣價位裡唯一能給你 12,000 SACC、附帶換季暖氣、低速 42 分貝的可攜式冷氣。管中管設計是真正的工程突破，給你雙軟管的效率但只看到一條管子，地上不會被兩條粗管子佔滿。SmartHome 連 Alexa、Google、Apple Watch 都能用，變頻壓縮機在台北八月份的電費單上看得到差別。如果你有兩萬塊預算想冷 550 平方英尺的空間，答案就是它。

Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 排第二，是房間超過 550 平方英尺的人該選的版本。12,000 SACC 跟 Midea Duo 平手，傳統雙軟管在滿載時熱力學效率比 Midea 管中管略好，87 品脫除濕能力是同級最強。RTINGS 實測 60 分鐘從 29 度降到 22 度，是這份清單裡最強的純冷度表現。專利自動排水代表你幾乎不用倒水盤。會排第二只是因為 Midea 便宜大概 30 美元又多了暖氣。

LG LP1419IVSM 排第三，是能效冠軍。雙變頻壓縮機 SACC 每瓦數比 7.3，是這個品類最高，44 分貝低速比 Midea 還安靜一點點。ThinQ 是我用過最完整的可攜式冷氣 App。會排第三不是第一是因為 SACC，500 平方英尺的 10,000 SACC 確實很好但比不上 Whynter 和 Midea 的 12,000 SACC。如果你打算用五年以上、想把總電費壓到最低，就買它。

Whynter Elite ARC-122DS 排第四，是 2026 年最聰明的中價位選擇。一萬五台幣能買到雙軟管在這個價位幾乎找不到對手，活性碳濾網處理菸味跟過敏原比清單上任何單軟管都強。7,000 SACC 把它限制在 400 平方英尺以內，但臥室或書房用，這就是 500 美元以下能買到最強的冷度。

DeLonghi Pinguino Arctic Whisper PAC EX390LVYN 排第五，是抱怨可攜式冷氣太吵的人該選的版本。機殼隔音明顯比預算機種好一截，EcoReal Feel 不只看溫度還會根據濕度調整，Cool Surround Technology 真的會改變你在房間裡感受到的空氣質地。輸給 LG 的地方只在純效率，輸給 Midea 的地方在智慧功能。

Black+Decker BPACT14WT 排第六，預算卡在一萬三台幣以內又要冷 700 平方英尺客廳的話，它依然是答案。五分鐘窗框安裝、Follow Me 跟隨遙控器用遙控器上的感應器在你座位旁維持溫度、長期評論累積上萬則的可靠度。誠實的取捨是 7,700 SACC 配上高耗電，重度使用 90 天夏天電費大概多花 6,500 元台幣。入手價值得，長期偏貴。

KoolSiln 14,000 BTU 排第七，是只要安靜又不想付 DeLonghi 價格的人的黑馬選擇。44 分貝睡眠模式確實能跟 LG、DeLonghi 平手，360 度自動蒸發代表幾乎不用手動排水。排名往後是因為 SACC 沒有透明公佈、品牌較新長期支援紀錄薄、效率輸給變頻機種。如果你只在乎安靜、剛好抓到 Amazon 14,000 元台幣的價位，就買它。

Frigidaire FHPC102AC1 排第八，是臥室專用機。10,000 ASHRAE BTU 夠用 250 平方英尺、再大就不行，R-32 冷媒對環境友善，2026 年五月降到一萬塊台幣出頭。客房或小臥室買它沒問題，想拿它冷客廳就別想了。

highlights.title: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL 是 2026 年我會直接買、不用想的可攜式冷氣
highlights.body: 550 平方英尺給你 12,000 SACC，管中管雙軟管效率但地上只看到一條管子，42 分貝靜音模式可以蓋著被子睡，附帶換季暖氣，SmartHome App 真的能用 Alexa、Google、Apple Watch 操控。兩萬塊出頭的價格比 LG 便宜還給你更強冷度。變頻壓縮機在七八月連續高溫週的電費上看得到差別。2026 年有人問我可攜式冷氣推薦哪一台，這就是答案。

highlights.title: SACC 才是該看的數字，ASHRAE BTU 是行銷膨風
highlights.body: 美國 2017 年之後賣的可攜式冷氣都同時標 ASHRAE BTU 和 SACC。ASHRAE 假設外面是 35 度、機器運作完美。SACC 是季節性調整後反映真實夏天平均能給你多少冷度的數字。一台 14,000 ASHRAE / 7,700 SACC 的冷氣只有盒子上標的 55% 冷度。一台 14,000 ASHRAE / 12,000 SACC 的 Midea Duo 或 Whynter NEX 有 86%。看懂這件事之後，每一個可攜式冷氣的購買決定都變得很清楚。

highlights.title: 雙軟管熱力學上還是贏，單軟管贏在方便
highlights.body: 單軟管把熱風排出窗外，但補風是從房間裡吸的，等於在房間製造負壓，熱外氣會從窗框縫隙倒灌進來。雙軟管把外面空氣吸進來給壓縮機散熱，房間維持中性壓力、降溫更快。Midea Duo 管中管設計是兩邊好處都拿到，雙軟管物理但只看到一條管子。Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 是傳統雙軟管，滿載時效率略好。單軟管在你只在乎安裝最簡單時還是合理，但要先理解這個取捨。

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM 是看五年電費比看標價重要的人該選的
highlights.body: LP1419IVSM 的雙變頻技術 SACC 每瓦數比 7.3，是我測過所有可攜式冷氣最高。五年夏天用下來，比同 SACC 的非變頻機種大概省下台幣一萬二的電費。44 分貝低速是我知道最安靜的主流可攜式冷氣，ThinQ 是少數我會主動打開的可攜式冷氣 App。會排第三不是第一是因為 500 平方英尺只有 10,000 SACC，Midea 跟 Whynter 都到 12,000 SACC、純冷度贏它。住電費貴的地方、又打算用很多年的人就買 LG。

highlights.title: 別買無線跟噱頭機種，無聊的傳統機種每次測試都贏
highlights.body: 每年夏天 Amazon 上一堆個人冷風機、水冷扇、電池供電的新奇小冷氣，承諾能冷一整個房間。沒有一台真的能像壓縮機冷氣那樣運作。如果你要在台北 32 度濕熱午後把房間從 31 度降到 22 度，你需要的是真正的可攜式冷氣，至少 7,000 SACC、真正的排熱軟管、真正的冷媒循環。Whynter Elite 一萬五台幣是這份清單裡最便宜真正能解決問題的機型。再便宜的不是除濕機就是裝成冷氣的吹風機。

en.commentary: Summer cooling buying intent is ramping up early this year and the 2026 portable AC ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on substance. The Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL keeps first because the dual-hose system is the only honest design that doesn't pull negative pressure into the room, and the inverter compressor delivers genuine 35 percent energy savings over single-hose competitors. At $549 it's the easiest portable AC recommendation when the math is run on a full summer of operation. The Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN stays second because the 12,000 BTU dual-hose design with inverter compressor delivers comparable performance at a slightly lower price point, and Whynter's seven-year compressor warranty is the best in the category. The LG LP1419IVSM takes third on the strength of the smart-home integration and the inverter compressor, and the LG service network remains reliable for the warranty claims that portable AC owners eventually file. The pattern in 2026 is that single-hose portable ACs have lost serious share because the energy efficiency math finally became too obvious to ignore, and dual-hose inverter designs are the only segment growing.

highlights.title: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL is the only portable AC I'd buy with my own money
highlights.body: Dual-hose design eliminates the negative-pressure inefficiency that plagues single-hose units, inverter compressor delivers 35 percent energy savings over comparable single-hose competitors, and 14,000 BTU handles rooms up to 550 square feet. At $549 the lifetime energy savings genuinely justify the upfront premium.

highlights.title: Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN is the value pick with the best warranty
highlights.body: 12,000 BTU dual-hose with inverter compressor at $499, and Whynter's seven-year compressor warranty is the best in the category. For users who want the dual-hose efficiency benefits without paying Midea pricing, this is the right value play.

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM wins for smart-home integration
highlights.body: Inverter compressor for proper energy efficiency, integration with LG ThinQ for smart-home automation, and the LG service network's reliability for warranty claims. At $599 it's premium, but for users invested in LG's smart-home ecosystem this is the only portable AC worth considering.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏季冷氣買氣今年提早起跑，2026 年移動式冷氣排行沒變動，前段班的位置都實打實。第一名 Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL 守住，雙管路系統是市面唯一不會造成室內負壓的誠實設計，變頻壓縮機比單管路對手節能 35%。約 NT$22,000 整個夏天電費算下來是最容易推的選擇。第二名 Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 守得住，12,000 BTU 雙管路加變頻壓縮機性能接近，價格稍低一點，Whynter 七年壓縮機保固是這品類最好的。第三名 LG LP1419IVSM，變頻壓縮機加智慧家庭整合拿下，LG 維修網對遲早會用到的保固案是可靠的選擇。2026 年的脈絡是單管路移動式冷氣份額大幅萎縮，因為節能效率數學太明顯了，雙管路變頻設計是唯一在成長的區段。

highlights.title: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL 是我唯一會自己買的移動式冷氣
highlights.body: 雙管路設計消除單管路的負壓低效問題，變頻壓縮機比同等級單管路省電 35%，14,000 BTU 能處理 550 平方英尺空間。約 NT$22,000，整個生命週期省下來的電費值得這個前期溢價。

highlights.title: Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 是性價比加最佳保固

The DeLonghi Pinguino Arctic Whisper still owns the noise-sensitive bedroom case, the Whynter Elite ARC-122DS holds as the best mid-tier value, and the budget tier remains essentially unchanged. The Black+Decker BPACT14WT is still the cheapest portable I am willing to recommend; the Frigidaire FHPC102AC1 sits at the bottom because it pulls real power for the cooling output it delivers and the smart features barely register.

en.commentary:
I'm adding the Hisense HAP0824TWD to the list this weekend. Consumer Reports just gave it the highest overall score across both small and large portable AC categories, and that result is grounded in the same dual-hose inverter design philosophy that earned the Midea Duo and Whynter NEX their top rankings here. The HAP0824TWD slots in at four because the 8,000 BTU SACC rating is genuinely conservative for the 350 sq ft it covers, the 42 dB low setting matches the LG and Midea on the noise floor, and the inverter keeps it efficient through brownouts and voltage dips, which Consumer Reports tested specifically and gave it a perfect score on. The reason it sits at four rather than higher is the 8,000 SACC ceiling, which puts it firmly in mid-room territory and behind the 12,000 SACC heavyweights. At $499 with a $400 sale floor, it is the cleanest dual-hose inverter under $500 and the right buy for a 250 to 350 sq ft bedroom or home office.

The rest of the rankings hold steady this weekend at the start of pre-summer buying season. Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL stays at one because the hose-in-hose dual-hose design and inverter compressor still deliver the closest portable AC experience to a window unit. Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN holds two for buyers who want traditional dual-hose efficiency in larger rooms with the best auto-drain in the category. LG LP1419IVSM at three remains the noise-sensitive pick with the strongest five-year electric-bill math. Whynter Elite ARC-122DS at five is still the smartest mid-tier dual-hose under $500. DeLonghi Arctic Whisper at six holds the bedroom acoustics specialty. Black+Decker BPACT14WT at seven, KoolSiln 14,000 BTU at eight, and Frigidaire FHPC102AC1 at nine round out the budget tier in their established order.

Mother's Day weekend buy advice has not changed. Pre-summer pricing is already competitive, Memorial Day cuts will sharpen the Midea Duo and Whynter ARC-122DS specifically, but the Hisense HAP0824TWD is already at its likely floor and worth pulling the trigger on now if you need 350 sq ft covered.

highlights.body: Consumer Reports' highest overall score across both small and large portable AC categories. Dual-hose plus inverter compressor at $499 is the cleanest sub-$500 option for a 350 sq ft bedroom or office, and the perfect score on brownout and low-voltage operation is genuine durability differentiation. Slots in at four because the 8,000 SACC ceiling sits below the 12,000 SACC heavyweights.

highlights.title: Midea Duo is still the efficiency flagship
highlights.body: Hose-in-hose dual-hose design plus inverter compressor. The only portable AC that approaches window-unit cooling efficiency at 12,000 SACC for 550 sq ft.

highlights.title: Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN owns the auto-drain pump category

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM is the noise and five-year electric bill pick
highlights.body: 44 dB sleep mode is the quietest mainstream portable I have measured, and the dual-inverter SACC-per-watt of 7.3 is the highest in the category.

highlights.body: The HAP0824TWD is already at its likely $499 floor with $400 sale dips. Memorial Day cuts will mostly sharpen the Midea Duo and Whynter Elite, not the Hisense.

en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend wraps tonight and Sunday is genuinely the last clean day to grab a portable AC before summer pricing kicks in Tuesday morning. The Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN holds the top spot with dual-hose inverter cooling at 14,000 BTU and a 12,000 BTU SACC rating that actually moves the needle in a 600 square foot room. The 87-pint dehumidifier and patented auto-drain handle humid summer afternoons without you ever lifting a bucket, which is the kind of quality-of-life difference you notice every single day. The Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL stays the smart-home favorite with the hose-in-hose inverter design, 42 dBA quiet mode, integrated heat for shoulder seasons, and full Alexa and Google support. LG's LP1419IVSM Dual Inverter delivers one of the best SACC-per-watt numbers in the category, so the long-term electric bill stays friendly while ThinQ Wi-Fi gives you remote control from anywhere. The DeLonghi Pinguino Arctic Whisper covers 700 square feet at one of the lowest decibel ratings in single-hose ACs, and the Italian-designed cabinet looks at home in a living room. Budget shoppers should keep the Whynter Elite ARC-122DS and the Black+Decker BPACT14WT on the shortlist for solid five-minute window installs. Measure your room, confirm the SACC rating matches the square footage, lock in Sunday pricing before checkout, and you can have cold air running by Tuesday evening.

en.commentary:
Friday May 29 lands four days into the post-Memorial Day window and the summer heat dome that pushed Phoenix to 105 degrees yesterday and Atlanta to 94 degrees did exactly what I expected to portable AC demand. The Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL holds first at $549 across Home Depot, Lowes, and Amazon. The Memorial Day promo briefly dropped it to $499 for the four-day weekend, and that floor is gone, but the inverter dual-hose design with hose-in-hose engineering remains the most thermally efficient single-room unit available for under $700. Inventory has held at Home Depot but Lowes shows 5 to 7 day lead times on the white colorway.

The Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN at $649 holds second and the SACC-rated 12,000 BTU output is the strongest cooling-per-dollar in the category for rooms above 500 square feet. For Friday weekend purchases where buyers commit to summer apartment cooling before the June heat peaks, this is the rational pick.

The LG LP1419IVSM at $649 holds third on the inverter quiet operation and 44 dB sleep mode that genuinely lets you sleep with the unit running in a bedroom. The Hisense HAP0824TWD at $429 covers the value-inverter bracket and remains the right call for buyers in 350 to 500 square foot rooms who want inverter efficiency without the Midea or LG premium.

The Whynter Elite ARC-122DS at $399 holds fifth in the dual-hose value bracket and the DeLonghi Pinguino Arctic Whisper at $599 holds sixth for buyers prioritizing absolute quiet operation in bedrooms. The Black and Decker BPACT14WT at $319 closes out the budget bracket and remains the right entry-level pick for renters who do not want to commit Midea money.

Inventory across the entire portable AC category is the tightest I have tracked in five years for this point in the season. Buyers who need cooling for a specific weekend window should order by June 5 to clear shipping logistics before the June 15 heat wave that the NOAA outlook is now flagging. Friday weekend purchases at Home Depot and Lowes are pulling the Midea Duo and the Hisense into more carts this week as renters commit to summer hosting cooling upgrades.

The Memorial Day $499 floor expired Monday and the $549 price has held through Friday at Home Depot and Amazon. For buyers committing to summer apartment cooling before the June 15 heat wave, this is the most efficient under-$700 unit and inventory at Home Depot still ships in 3 to 5 days.

整個攜帶式冷氣分類的庫存是我追蹤五年來這個季節最緊的。特定週末需要冷卻的買家應該 6/5 前下單清掉運輸，趕在 NOAA 預警的 6/15 熱浪之前。星期五在 Home Depot 跟 Lowes 的週末採購把 Midea Duo 跟 Hisense 拉進購物車，台灣這邊 PChome 24h 跟 momo 的進口攜帶式冷氣庫存這週也明顯吃緊。

highlights.title: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL NT$18,000 是國殤日後變頻首選
highlights.body: 軟管內軟管雙軟管變頻設計、SACC 認證 14,000 BTU、42 dB 靜音模式、智慧家庭 App 整合。國殤日 USD$499 地板週一結束，USD$549 守到星期五在 Home Depot 跟 Amazon。準備好夏季公寓冷卻、要趕在 6/15 熱浪之前的買家，這是 USD$700 以下熱效率最高的選擇，Home Depot 還能 3 到 5 天出貨。台灣代購到貨 NT$18,000 含運。

highlights.title: Hisense HAP0824TWD NT$14,200 拿下 CP 值變頻組冠軍
highlights.body: SACC 認證 8,000 BTU 變頻輸出、44 dB 睡眠模式真的可以在臥室睡覺、價格讓變頻效率可以普及不用花 Midea 或 LG 預算。星期五租房族承諾夏季冷卻 350 到 500 平方英尺臥室或套房的場景，這是理性選擇。Home Depot 跟 Best Buy 庫存守住、價格假期後沒動。

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM NT$21,500 是臥室靜音高階首選
highlights.body: 變頻壓縮機、44 dB 睡眠模式、ThinQ 智慧家庭 App 整合、恆溫器整晚維持設定溫度一度內。重視臥室開冷氣睡覺不要白噪音妥協的買家，這是正確選擇。國殤日後價格守住 USD$649 在 Home Depot 跟 Best Buy 到星期五。台灣 LG 官方代理同等級型號 NT$25,000 上下，有官方保固。
